step_by_step_thinking:
Agreeing with the previous assessment, pulse oximetry specifically measures oxygen saturation rather than any other parameter listed. It does so through indirect measurement techniques focusing on light absorption characteristics which correlate directly with hemoglobin's ability to carry oxygen. Therefore, my agreement stands firm.
